pr.title: feat(ui): /family action-first redesign (Figma Manage Family V2)

receipt.goal: Align `/family` closer to Figma screenshot by removing the right column and redundant child profile cards, while keeping existing data plumbing and real links/interactions.
decisions_made: Removed desktop right-side marketing/support rail for visual parity with the Figma screenshot.
Removed child profile card grid from `/family` to avoid duplicate management UI.
Kept existing route wiring and persistence: reminders toggle via user_notification_prefs; gift-share widget unchanged.
verification_steps: Lint/TS: `pnpm exec eslint` on modified `/family` component.
receipt.rollback_plan: Revert/close the PR and switch back to `main` (no DB/schema changes were made).
